notes: Each eval drives the axon4to5-migrate skill with the event-store recipe in single mode. Coverage: Spring Boot + JPA (Success, explicit @Bean + @EntityScan required), Spring Boot + Axon Server (Success, explicit @Bean AggregateBasedAxonServerEventStorageEngine), native + Axon Server (Success, registerEventStorageEngine on EventSourcingConfigurer), and Mongo blocker (Blocker B1). Fixtures live in evals/fixtures/synthetic/.

evals.name: spring-jpa-explicit-bean
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. EventStoreConfigSpringJpa.java is an AF4 Spring Boot configuration class with `EmbeddedEventStore` + `JpaEventStorageEngine`. Apply the event-store recipe (JPA backend, Spring Boot path): (1) delete the `EmbeddedEventStore` @Bean and the `EventStorageEngine storageEngine()` @Bean; (2) add a new `@Bean EventStorageEngine eventStorageEngine(EntityManagerFactory, EventConverter)` returning `new AggregateBasedJpaEventStorageEngine(new JpaTransactionalExecutorProvider(entityManagerFactory), eventConverter, UnaryOperator.identity())`; (3) add AF5 imports; (4) also add `@EntityScan(basePackages = {"com.example", "org.axonframework", "io.axoniq.framework"})` as a comment NOTE since there is no main application class in the fixture — note in Result that caller must add @EntityScan to their @SpringBootApplication class. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: EventStoreConfigSpringJpa.java rewritten: EmbeddedEventStore deleted, explicit @Bean AggregateBasedJpaEventStorageEngine added with JpaTransactionalExecutorProvider + EventConverter; @EntityScan note in Result; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-event-store

evals.name: spring-axon-server-explicit-bean
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. EventStoreConfigSpringAxonServer.java is an AF4 Spring Boot @Configuration class with an `@Bean AxonServerEventStore`. Apply the event-store recipe (Axon Server backend, Spring Boot path): (1) delete the AF4 `@Bean AxonServerEventStore eventStore(...)` method; (2) add `@Bean EventStorageEngine storageEngine(AxonServerConnectionManager connectionManager, EventConverter eventConverter)` returning `new AggregateBasedAxonServerEventStorageEngine(connectionManager.getConnection(), eventConverter)`; (3) add AF5 imports (`io.axoniq.framework.axonserver.connector.api.AxonServerConnectionManager`, `io.axoniq.framework.axonserver.connector.event.AggregateBasedAxonServerEventStorageEngine`, `org.axonframework.eventsourcing.eventstore.EventStorageEngine`, `org.axonframework.messaging.eventhandling.conversion.EventConverter`); (4) remove AF4 imports. No @EntityScan needed for Axon Server backend. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: EventStoreConfigSpringAxonServer.java: AF4 AxonServerEventStore @Bean deleted; explicit @Bean AggregateBasedAxonServerEventStorageEngine added; AF5 imports present; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-event-store

evals.name: native-axon-server-configurer
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=native mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. EventStoreConfigNativeAxonServer.java is an AF4 native (non-Spring) configuration class using `DefaultConfigurer.defaultConfiguration()` + `configurer.configureEventStore(config -> AxonServerEventStore.builder()...)`. Apply the event-store recipe (Axon Server backend, native path): (1) replace `DefaultConfigurer.defaultConfiguration()` with `EventSourcingConfigurer.create()`; (2) replace `configurer.configureEventStore(...)` with `configurer.registerEventStorageEngine(config -> { AxonServerConnectionManager manager = config.getComponent(AxonServerConnectionManager.class); return new AggregateBasedAxonServerEventStorageEngine(manager.getConnection(), config.getComponent(EventConverter.class)); })`; (3) replace `buildConfiguration()` with `build()` and change return type to `AxonConfiguration`; (4) add AF5 imports; (5) remove AF4 imports. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: EventStoreConfigNativeAxonServer.java: DefaultConfigurer replaced with EventSourcingConfigurer; registerEventStorageEngine with AggregateBasedAxonServerEventStorageEngine; buildConfiguration() replaced with build(); AF5 imports; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-event-store

evals.name: spring-mongo-blocker
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. EventStoreConfigMongoBlocker.java is an AF4 Spring Boot configuration with `MongoEventStorageEngine`. The event-store recipe detects B1 (MongoEventStorageEngine — no AF5 release of axon-mongo). Source MUST stay byte-identical — no AggregateBasedJpaEventStorageEngine, no AggregateBasedAxonServerEventStorageEngine added. Emit Blocker B1 with Options (move-to-axon-server / move-to-jpa / pause-migration / skip / revert / solve-manually). Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: MongoEventStorageEngine detected; source untouched; Result: 🚧 Blocker B1.

assertions.text: No AF5 JPA engine added (source untouched)
No AF5 Axon Server engine added (source untouched)
